summary: All five requirements (REQ-79 through REQ-83) appear to be substantially implemented. The backend adds amenities to the Hostel type, addHostel, updateHostel, and all seed records. The frontend adds amenity pills to HostelCard, an AmenitiesSection component used in HostelDetail, an amenities checklist in EditHostel, and the useMutations hook passes amenities. Minor concerns exist around placement of AmenitiesSection in HostelDetail (spec says between room sharing/pricing and map, but summary says between description and map) and the checklist has 15 amenities which satisfies the at-least-12 requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Amenities section must be placed between the room sharing/pricing section and the map section in HostelDetail.
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend-file-summaries.txt states AmenitiesSection is placed between the description and the map section, not between room sharing/pricing and the map as specified. The HostelDetail diff is truncated so the exact placement cannot be confirmed from code.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration from old Hostel records without amenities to new records with amenities.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request a migration module. It only asked for the amenities field to be added and seed records to be updated. The migration.mo file is an additional implementation not mentioned in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: COMMON_AMENITIES list in EditHostel includes 15 amenities including Library, Movie Room, and Gaming Zone beyond the 12 specified in the requirement.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec lists exactly 12 common amenities. Adding Library, Movie Room, and Gaming Zone beyond the specified list was not explicitly requested, though it satisfies the at-least-12 acceptance criterion.
